title: hypolepis obtusata
intro: Hypolepis obtusata, also known as the Rough Fern or Rough Lip Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Hypolepidaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation and fever. The health benefits of Hypolepis obtusata include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can aid in wound healing and prevent infections. Hypolepis obtusata is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
